T0012.title: SMS Code Pickup
T0012.definition: SMS verification code reception, the act of obtaining another person's mobile phone verification code through specialized platforms or techniques for malicious purposes such as unauthorized account registration or identity verification bypass. A 'code-receiving number' refers to a grey-market or bonus-abusing user leveraging a code-receiving platform to bulk-register or log into accounts using black-market SIM cards, thereby exploiting platform or mini-program promotional rewards.

references.title: Overseas e-commerce platform risk research report for the first half of 2024
